chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1268 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.9387/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.9388/2025 3. For orders on office objection No.1 to 6 a/w rely as at A 4. For hearing of CMA No.7986/2025 5. For hearing of main case 23.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Raza, advocate for the petitioner --------- Urgency granted. This matter is already fixed on 30.01.2026. The same is treated as ante-dated and heard today. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court, therefore, he does not press this petition under instructions. Order accordingly. JUDGE Nadir*
